artifacts.title: Day receipt from 2024-08-06
artifacts.excerpt: Thank you @Prigoose for this amazing class on using twitter. It feels amazing to be using this technology with a group of people irl and joining the few who actually create content rather than lurk!!

artifacts.title: Day receipt from 2024-08-06
artifacts.excerpt: I worry about being canceled, but I think the real fear is posting and feeling ignored. But now I'm thinking of "Social Media" as a fun dance floor that I can activate with my friends by being silly. And maybe its like dancing alone (imo one of life's greatest pleasures)

artifacts.title: Each receipt from 2020-09-22
artifacts.excerpt: I have one vote, and each student has one vote. I will be posting about this experience alot- and showing the power of opening the curriculum to full student choice. I will be documenting the process, both successes and failures, so stay tuned for updates!
